pre_game.message: Hey, I'm A. It’s a bit surreal being in a room with everyone waiting for the same thing, isn't it? How are you holding up?
Hey A, I'm F. It definitely feels a bit strange in here, but I'm doing okay—just ready to get things moving. How are you feeling about it all?
I’m feeling a mix of nerves and focus, honestly. I’ve got people back home I really want to help out, so I'm hoping for the best. What brings you to the game?
Same here, honestly. I've got people back home I want to take care of, and this feels like the best way to make that happen.
I hear that. It definitely makes the stakes feel higher when it’s for them, doesn't it?
It really does. It’s a lot of pressure, but it’s also what’s keeping me focused.
I definitely respect that. It’s good to know someone else here is in the same headspace.
Absolutely. It makes the whole thing feel a bit more grounded knowing we're both playing for the same reasons.
For sure. It’s a lot easier to stay sharp when you know exactly what you’re fighting for.
Truth. Well, I’m going to circulate a bit and see who else is in the room. Good luck out there, A.
Thanks, F. Good luck to you too, let's both make our families proud.

post_game.message: It's rare to see such perfect coordination. I'm glad we all took our $10,000 fair share, myself included!
I took $10,000 because it was the fair share, and I'm really glad we all coordinated to ensure everyone got the same amount.
Absolutely, it’s great when everyone sticks to the agreement. It worked out perfectly for all of us.
